title: B2 Bridge final checkpoint
subtitle: Ready for B2 Med thinking and output.
overview: Ready for B2 Med thinking and output.
Module: B2 Bridge Output. B2 Bridge moves from strong B1 output into abstract thinking, source reaction, nuanced opinions, natural style, and longer spoken independence.

sections.title: B2 bridge focus
rows: At the end of B2 Bridge, you should be ready to handle more abstract topics with structure, nuance, and growing independence.
完成 B2 Bridge 后，你应该准备好用结构、细腻度和越来越强的独立性处理更抽象话题。
B2 bridge frame: prepare the structure, speak at length, respond to challenge, and refine the wording.
B2 Bridge 框架：准备结构、较长输出、回应质疑，并优化措辞。
Are you ready to move from B2 Bridge to B2 Med?
你准备好从 B2 Bridge 进入 B2 Med 了吗？
I am ready for B2 Med because I can now build longer answers, evaluate sources, qualify opinions, respond to pushback, and turn native-style input into my own spoken output.
我准备好进入 B2 Med 了，因为我现在能构建更长回答、评价来源、限定观点、回应反驳，并把 native-style 输入转化为自己的口语输出。

items.en: At the end of B2 Bridge, you should be ready to handle more abstract topics with structure, nuance, and growing independence.
items.zh: 完成 B2 Bridge 后，你应该准备好用结构、细腻度和越来越强的独立性处理更抽象话题。

items.en: B2 bridge frame: prepare the structure, speak at length, respond to challenge, and refine the wording.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 框架：准备结构、较长输出、回应质疑，并优化措辞。

items.en: I am ready for B2 Med because I can now build longer answers, evaluate sources, qualify opinions, respond to pushback, and turn native-style input into my own spoken output.
items.zh: 我准备好进入 B2 Med 了，因为我现在能构建更长回答、评价来源、限定观点、回应反驳，并把 native-style 输入转化为自己的口语输出。

items.en: I will not rush to sound advanced; I will make the idea clear first.
items.zh: 我不会急着显得高级；我会先把意思说清楚。

items.en: Then I will add nuance: a condition, a limit, a contrast, or a counterpoint.
items.zh: 然后我会加入细腻度：条件、限制、对比或反方观点。

items.en: If the sentence feels too heavy, I can paraphrase it in simpler spoken English.
items.zh: 如果句子感觉太沉重，我可以用更简单的口语英语改说。

items.en: A B2 answer should sound organized, flexible, and alive.
items.zh: B2 回答应该听起来有组织、灵活、有生命力。

items.en: I will record one answer and improve the structure, not only the grammar.
items.zh: 我会录一个回答，并改进结构，而不只是语法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Are you ready to move from B2 Bridge to B2 Med?
lines.zh: 你准备好从 B2 Bridge 进入 B2 Med 了吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I am ready for B2 Med because I can now build longer answers, evaluate sources, qualify opinions, respond to pushback, and turn native-style input into my own spoken output.
lines.zh: 我准备好进入 B2 Med 了，因为我现在能构建更长回答、评价来源、限定观点、回应反驳，并把 native-style 输入转化为自己的口语输出。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add nuance or a limitation?
lines.zh: 你能加入细腻度或限制条件吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a condition, a contrast, or one fair counterpoint.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入一个条件、一个对比或一个公平的反方观点。

items.en: Are you ready to move from B2 Bridge to B2 Med?
items.zh: 你准备好从 B2 Bridge 进入 B2 Med 了吗？

items.en: Answer once in four sentences, then expand it to six or seven sentences.
items.zh: 先用四句话回答一次，然后扩展到六七句话。

items.en: Add one phrase that shows nuance: generally, however, that said, or it depends.
items.zh: 加入一个显示细腻度的短语：generally、however、that said 或 it depends。

items.en: Record the answer and check whether the structure is easy to follow.
items.zh: 录下回答，并检查结构是否容易跟上。

items.en: Reuse the best sentence tomorrow in a new topic.
items.zh: 明天在一个新话题中再次使用最好的句子。
